title: Alabama Association of Disability Examiners (AADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Governing document of the Alabama Association of Disability Examiners (AADE), a Southeast Region chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Contains the chapter Constitution (Articles I-XI: name, relationship to NADE, definitions, purposes, membership, limitations, officers, board of directors, meetings, by-laws, amendments) followed by the By-Laws (election of officers, duties of officers, duties of the board, fiscal year of Aug 1-Jul 31, standing committees, regional representation, delegate-selection tracks, parliamentary authority, and amendment procedure).

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Alabama Chapter
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Alabama Association of Disability Examiners (AADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Alabama-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect minor conversion artifacts (e.g. the original-document typos 'ARITCLE III', 'BOARD OF DIRECTCORS', and 'a;; deposits' that survive verbatim). The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link to this specific document. No adoption/revision date is stated in the content, so temporal_coverage is omitted.
